  • weekly picks (May 3 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 May 3th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    05/18

    1. s42005-026-02686-5 Frequency-encoded magnetic resonance imaging with dynamic radio frequency field gradients (Communications Physics)

    2. s42005-026-02659-8 Roughening and dynamics of an electric flux string in a (2+1)D lattice gauge theory (Communications Physics)

    3. s41598-026-47840-9 Hydrophobic porous polysulfone membrane contactors with gravity-driven Ca(OH)2 absorption for low-energy CO2 removal from biogas (Scientific Reports)

    4. 2605.15274v1 Unveiling Magnetic Frustration via the Elastocaloric Effect (arXiv)

    5. 2605.15283v1 Stochastic Safety Limits and Scale-Dependent Power Fluctuations in Nuclear Reactors: A Critical Scaling Approach (arXiv)

    6. 2605.15292v1 Zitterbewegung velocity in semiclassical electron dynamics (arXiv)

    7. 2605.15332v1 Disorder-driven symmetry suppression by van der Waals planar defects in a magnetic topological insulator (arXiv)

    8. 2605.15441v1 Strong universality class in disordered systems (arXiv)

    9. 2605.15447v1 Multifractal and Ergodic Properties of Conductance Fluctuations under Strong Disorder (arXiv)

    10. 2605.15521v1 Entropy Production from Spin–Vibrational Coupling in Endohedral-Fullerene Qubits Encapsulated in Suspended Carbon Nanotubes (arXiv)

    11. 2605.15541v1 Quantum Geometry-Driven Nonlinear Spin Currents in Floquet Non-Hermitian Altermagnets (arXiv)

    12. 2605.15544v1 p-Wave Orbital Angular Momentum Texture in a Chiral Crystal (arXiv)

    13. 2605.15610v1 Non-Relativistic Spin-Orbit Interaction in Triplet Superconductors: Edelstein Effect and Spin Pumping by Electric Fields (arXiv)

    14. 2605.15631v1 Topological property of graphene with triangular array of nanoholes (arXiv)

    15. 2605.15667v1 A Finite-State Gibbs Construction from a Recognition Cost (arXiv)

    16. 2605.15703v1 Observation of flat-bottom U-shaped energy gap in high-Tc nickelate (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin films (arXiv)

    17. 2605.15730v1 Short-time critical dynamics in the classical cubic dimer model (arXiv)

    18. 2605.15751v1 Equidistant resonance jumps in superconducting coplanar resonators driven by Abrikosov vortices (arXiv)

    19. 2605.15805v1 Markov State Model for the forced unfolding of a small peptide (arXiv)

    20. 2605.15807v1 Layer-dependent Land'e $g$-factors of electrons, holes, and excitons in two-dimensional Ruddlesden-Popper lead halide perovskites (arXiv)

    21. 2605.15829v1 Thermodynamic signatures of a field-induced ordered intermediate phase in Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$ (arXiv)

    22. 2605.15834v1 Effective increase of a superconducting critical temperature in a high-entropy electron mixture (arXiv)

    23. 2605.15841v1 Critical quench dynamics of Wegner’s $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge model: a geometric perspective (arXiv)

    25. 2605.15899v1 Solving Classical and Quantum Spin Glasses with Deep Boltzmann Quantum States (arXiv)

    27. 2605.15912v1 Actin cross-linking organizes basal body patterning through anomalous diffusion transitions (arXiv)

    28. 2605.15914v1 The Directed Abelian Sandpile Model on Cylinders (arXiv)

    29. 2605.15930v1 Bak–Tang–Wiesenfeld model for various topologies and ranges of interaction (arXiv)

    31. 2605.15981v1 Orbital Angular Momentum Textures and Currents in a Discrete Helix: Equilibrium and Linear Response (arXiv)

    32. 2605.15994v1 Large-$N$ scaling of Tan’s contact for the harmonically trapped Tonks–Girardeau gas at finite temperature (arXiv)

    33. 2605.16012v1 Charge-sensitive vibrational modes in BEDT-TTF salts: Signatures of charge ordering and site charge (arXiv)

    34. 2605.16018v1 Benchmarking empirical and machine-learned interatomic potentials using phase diagram predictions for Lead (arXiv)

    36. 2605.16055v1 Fuzzy band structure of quantum dots by Bloch Orbital Expansion, unconventional insights into geometry-electronic structure relations (arXiv)

    37. 2605.16059v1 Spherically symmetric approaches in the theoretical study of low-dimensional magnets (arXiv)

    38. 2605.16061v1 Transport signatures of valley polarization in graphene multilayers: In-plane linear magnetoconductivity vs anomalous Hall effect (arXiv)

    41. 2605.16123v1 Thermal conductivity of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO$_2$: A comparative study (arXiv)

    42. 2605.16125v1 Staggering domino-like blast front motion in a one-dimensional cold gas (arXiv)
